spec.name: In The Forest
spec.description: The energy barrier runs through the woods on its east- west course here, just north of the trail you are walking on. A faint humming seems to eminate from the glowing field, pushing the normal sounds of the forest into the background. For a short moment, you wonder if the field is keeping something in, or you out. It makes you wonder...

extra_descs.description: You can faintly see the woods continue beyond it, but it seems there's no way through. The field rises high up into the air, and seems to form a ceiling above the woods, preventing a flying entrance. You'd also bet it extends deep into the ground.
